entities.description: A defense response involving the accumulation of callose

entities.description: A defense response involving the accumulation of hydrogen peroxide

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Method used to analyze the activity of defense enzymes

entities.description: Method used to analyze the expression of defense genes

entities.name: NITRIC OXIDE
entities.description: A central regulator of defense signaling that triggers downstream responses

entities.name: PEROXIDASE

entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity is enhanced by LPS and NO
